input.subject: Your Complete Travel Itinerary - Tokyo Trip
input.snippet: Here's your complete itinerary for your upcoming trip to Tokyo...
input.body_text:
PREMIER TRAVEL AGENCY
Your Complete Itinerary

══════════════════════════════════════
TOKYO ADVENTURE
April 10-17, 2026
══════════════════════════════════════

Traveler: Sarah Johnson
Booking Ref: PTT-2026-4589

──────────────────────────────────────
DAY 1 - FRIDAY, APRIL 10
──────────────────────────────────────

✈️ OUTBOUND FLIGHT
Japan Airlines JL 001
Depart: San Francisco (SFO) 11:30 AM
Arrive: Tokyo Narita (NRT) 3:30 PM +1 day (April 11)
Duration: 11h 0m
Seat: 32K

──────────────────────────────────────
DAY 2 - SATURDAY, APRIL 11
──────────────────────────────────────

🚌 AIRPORT TRANSFER
Limousine Bus - Narita to Shinjuku
Depart: 4:30 PM from Narita Airport
Arrive: ~6:30 PM at Shinjuku Bus Terminal
Ticket: Prepaid, show email

🏨 HOTEL CHECK-IN
Park Hyatt Tokyo
3-7-1-2 Nishi Shinjuku
Shinjuku-ku, Tokyo 163-1055
Check-in: From 3:00 PM
Confirmation: 12345PH
7 nights (April 11-18)

──────────────────────────────────────
DAY 8 - SATURDAY, APRIL 18
──────────────────────────────────────

🏨 HOTEL CHECK-OUT
By 12:00 PM

✈️ RETURN FLIGHT
Japan Airlines JL 002
Depart: Tokyo Narita (NRT) 5:00 PM
Arrive: San Francisco (SFO) 10:30 AM (same day)
Duration: 9h 30m
Seat: 31K

══════════════════════════════════════

Emergency Contact: +1-800-555-TRAV
24/7 Support: support@travelagency.com

Have a wonderful trip!
